commentLens.commands.toggle.title: Comment Lens: Toggle
commentLens.commands.refresh.title: Comment Lens: Refresh
commentLens.commands.copyDiagnosticsForI: Comment Lens: Copy Diagnostics for Issue
commentLens.configuration.languages.desc: Registered adapter language identifiers where Comment Lens runs. This setting filters supported adapter languages; unknown language identifiers are ignored.
commentLens.configuration.languageOverri: Per-language Comment Lens settings keyed by VS Code language identifier. For example: { "python": { "enabled": false } }.
Enable or disable Comment Lens for this language.
Maximum source line length scanned for candidate symbols. Longer lines are skipped to avoid expensive lookups in generated or minified files.
Maximum length of the inline comment summary.
commentLens.configuration.maxHintsPerReq: Maximum number of hints produced per inlay hint request.
commentLens.configuration.minIdentifierL: Minimum identifier length before hints are shown unless documentation includes a definition location.
commentLens.configuration.minimumDocumen: Minimum number of words required in a documentation summary before it can be shown.
commentLens.configuration.preferProperty: Prefer the final identifier in property chains, such as baz in foo.bar.baz.
commentLens.configuration.dedupeLineHint: Deduplicate repeated inlay hint summaries on the same line.
commentLens.configuration.resolveTimeout: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for a single documentation lookup.
commentLens.configuration.maxCacheEntrie: Maximum number of cached documentation lookup results.
commentLens.configuration.hintPrefix.des: Prefix displayed before each inline documentation summary.
commentLens.configuration.enableHintInte: Enable inlay hint label tooltips and definition locations when documentation lookup provides them. Details are resolved lazily when VS Code asks for them.
